signupData.goalsElaboration: CrossFit athlete transitioning from Scaled to Rx. Preparing for 2025 CrossFit Open (8 weeks away). Need to string bar muscle-ups, increase Olympic lifts (C&J 155→175, Snatch 115→135), improve engine for longer chippers.
signupData.locationElaboration: CrossFit Riverdale affiliate - full CrossFit setup: barbells, bumper plates, rowers, Assault bikes, pull-up rigs, rings, rope, plyo boxes, GHD, kettlebells 8-70 lb, dumbbells 10-100 lb
signupData.injuries: Right wrist strain history (spring 2024) from high-rep overhead work. Manages with mobility and taping. Flares up with >30 snatches or >50 HSPU in single session.
signupData.experienceElaboration: 2 years CrossFit, 3 years general fitness before. Competed scaled at 3 local throwdowns, placed top 10 twice. Got first bar muscle-up fall 2024. Trains Mon/Tue/Wed/Fri/Sat at 5:30 PM class.

onboardingMessages: I do CrossFit and I'm trying to go from Scaled to Rx for the upcoming Open. I need to get my bar muscle-ups strung together and hit heavier barbell weights.
I train at my CrossFit affiliate 5 days a week - they have everything. Full rig, barbells, rowers, bikes, kettlebells, the works.
My Olympic lifts need work - clean and jerk is 155 lb and snatch is 115. I also gas out in longer workouts after about 12-15 minutes.
I have a wrist issue from last year that flares up with too many snatches or HSPU. I tape it for heavy days and manage the volume.
